Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

    • listAssets

      public AssetsListAssets1Response listAssets(Optional<String> parent, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter) throws Exception
      List Assets Lists assets
      Specified by:
      listAssets in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAssetsListAssets1
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent resource name, which is the correspondent ID.
      pageSize - The maximum number of assets to return. The service may return fewer than this value. Default is 100 (subject to change) The maximum is 1000, values exceeding this will be set to 1000 (subject to change)
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListAssets` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page. When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAssets` must match the call that provided the page token in order to maintain a stable result set.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information;
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public AssetsListAssetsCorrespondentResponse listAssetsCorrespondent(String correspondentId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter) throws Exception
      List Assets (By Correspondent) Lists assets
      Specified by:
      listAssetsCorrespondent in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAssetsListAssetsCorrespondent
      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of assets to return. The service may return fewer than this value. Default is 100 (subject to change) The maximum is 1000, values exceeding this will be set to 1000 (subject to change)
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListAssets` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page. When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAssets` must match the call that provided the page token in order to maintain a stable result set.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information;
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
